description: The Quarantine building is bombed and begins to collapse. Mace exhibits extreme heroism by holding up debris to save a child while everyone else escapes. May, after a moment of hesitation, ultimately helps the team evacuate. As the team watches helplessly, Mace is crushed and buried, sacrificing himself to save others.

transcript.line: The building's unstable, Agent May. You can't go in.
I need verification that the Patriot's dead. If he's not, he will be. Activating body cam. Going in.
Wait! Don't shoot! Th-They need help up there.
This is Agent May. There are kids in here. Why the hell are there kids in here?
Put that gun down. We need help here. There's a kid buried under that pile of rock.
Are you insane? He's trying to save a kid.
Agent May, Mace is the only thing keeping this building from falling down on all of us. You shoot him, we all die.
We don't have time for this. We got to save that kid. Form a chain. Find something to prop up that beam. Either shoot us or help, but don't just stand there. Snap out of it, May.
Hang on, Chris. I got you. Come on.
No! We're not going to leave you!
I'm right here, Jeffrey. Hang on.
